hooks.command: jq -c --arg ws "${CMUX_WORKSPACE_ID:-}" --arg sf "${CMUX_SURFACE_ID:-}" '{title:(.hook_event_name // "Claude Code"), body:(.message // ""), kind:(.hook_event_name // ""), workspace_id:$ws, surface_id:$sf, source:"claude-code"}' | curl -sS -m 3 -o /dev/null -X POST http://host.docker.internal:8765/notify -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @- || true

jq -c --arg ws "${CMUX_WORKSPACE_ID:-}" --arg sf "${CMUX_SURFACE_ID:-}" '{title:(.hook_event_name // "Claude Code"), body:(.message // ""), kind:(.hook_event_name // ""), workspace_id:$ws, surface_id:$sf, source:"claude-code"}' | curl -sS -m 3 -o /dev/null -X POST http://host.docker.internal:8765/notify -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @- || true

jq -c --arg ws "${CMUX_WORKSPACE_ID:-}" --arg sf "${CMUX_SURFACE_ID:-}" '{title:(.hook_event_name // "Claude Code"), body:(.message // ""), kind:(.hook_event_name // ""), workspace_id:$ws, surface_id:$sf, source:"claude-code"}' | curl -sS -m 3 -o /dev/null -X POST http://host.docker.internal:8765/notify -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @- || true
